title: Dynasty Cobblemon
description:
The official modpack for DynastyMC Network Cobblemon on Fabric! Contains all the essentials + some optimisation perks. Keybinding has also been adjusted to work well with the server with 0 conflicts!

Join us now!
play.dynastymc.org
body:
## DynastyMC
The official modpack for DynastyMC Network Cobblemon on Fabric!

Contains all the essentials you need to join the server and have a great integrated experience! All keybindings has been configured for no conflict and minor optimisation tweaks.

### Modlist
- Cobblemon
- Fabric API
- CIT Resewn
- Iris
- Just Enough Items
- Memory Leak Fix
- Sodium
- Xaero's Minimap
- Xaeros World Map

Pretty simple, feel free to branch off and add anything you like! After all, you simply just need Cobblemon to join our lovely little network :)

### Join us!
- Server IP: **play.dynastymc.org**
- Discord: **https://discord.gg/dynastymc**
